failures.claim: init.yml - Initialize Radxa server with required dependencies
failures.actual: Playbook initializes 'Jetson Nano deployment' (hosts: jetson) - contains outdated references to Jetson instead of Radxa

failures.claim: sync.yml - Sync project files to Radxa server
failures.expected: Playbook should sync to Radxa server
failures.actual: Playbook syncs to 'Jetson Nano' (hosts: jetson) - contains outdated Jetson references

failures.claim: start.yml - Start Docker services on Radxa server
failures.expected: Playbook should start services on Radxa
failures.actual: Playbook starts services on 'Jetson Nano' (hosts: jetson) - contains outdated Jetson references
Playbook cleans 'Jetson Nano deployment' (hosts: jetson) - contains outdated Jetson references
